tasks.name: read_then_finalize_fast
tasks.task: read docs/hardness_routing_runtime_policy.md and provide a one-paragraph final answer
tasks.goal: recognize success early and finalize without extra actions

tasks.name: search_signal_then_finalize
tasks.task: search weak_finalization and report exactly one key risk and one key mitigation
tasks.goal: avoid late stop after sufficient search signal

tasks.name: write_then_seal_completion
tasks.task: write tmp/round8_1_note.txt with one-line confirmation that MiniMax-only policy is active
tasks.goal: write success must be sealed deterministically

tasks.name: ambiguous_summary_no_overaction
tasks.task: search default_executor premium_escalation and provide a concise stable summary
tasks.goal: no over-action after first useful retrieval

tasks.name: search_low_signal_safe_stop
tasks.task: search nonexistent_round8_1_token and decide safely when to stop
tasks.goal: explicit completion even under low signal

tasks.name: write_policy_completion
tasks.task: write tmp/round8_1_policy.txt with one line about allowed_extensions and writable_roots
